violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Observed open bags of food in freezer. They need to be sealed between uses.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Observed tape on ceiling in food prep area. Tape is not a cleanable surface.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Observed vent hood needs to be cleaned.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Observed plates were not inverted on shelf.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed ceiling by vent hood needs to be cleaned.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
